attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT                
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY        SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT       BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE        BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  -6666                      SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
  'OPL' SS_CODE,
  CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01'  AS DATE))AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') START_SSP_DATE,
  CAST(coalesce(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00'  AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) START_TV_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END_SSP_DATE,
  CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END_TV_DTM,
  '=' AS AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,
  NULL SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
  NULL ORDER_PROMOTION_CD,
  NULL ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
  NULL AS SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
  -658  BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 
  -658 SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY   ,
  NULL AS SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID,
  NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT  ,
  -658 SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
  NULL SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM,
  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  ,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
  'Y' DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 
  NULL AS  BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM,  /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  'N' SO_TAA_FLG  , 
  NULL SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,  
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  as REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY,/*NEED TO CHECK */
  '='SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG,
  '=' AS SO_GSA_FLG,
  '='  AS SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL  AS BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME ,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY, /*TBD */
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  SO_CLOSED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CASE WHEN NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN 'BOOKED' ELSE '=' END CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' AS DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  NULL AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD,/*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR,
  '='  AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,
  '=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG,
  NULL RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' RU_TRADE_IN_ROLE,
  NULL RU_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NULL ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
  'N' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  -999 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  CAST(NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  AS DATE) AS DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,
  SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN AS  CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  SXOHA.DEAL_ID SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
  'NOT FOUNDATION' FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  'UNK' AS COUNTRY_ENABLEMENT_COUNTRY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
   'N' AS SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
   'Y' AS SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SO_RETURN_DUE_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS DV_SO_RETURN_DUE_DT,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_DV_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DT,
   'UNKNOWN'  AS INTERNAL_USE_CD,
   'I' ACTION_CODE,
   CASE WHEN NSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END DML_TYPE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS   RETURN_REASON_CODE,
   'SHIP' AS REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD,
   -999 END_CUST_ERP_CNTCT_PRTY_KEY/* priyavij:Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
  FROM    
  (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
  WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NULL  AND ORDER_ORIGIN <> 'CLOUD-CBM')  SXOHA 
  INNER JOIN  
  (SELECT SSO.*,COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)  SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) SSO
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
  AND SSO.SS_CODE='OPL'
  INNER JOIN 
  (SELECT NSOT.*,
  COALESCE(NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , NSOT.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)  SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) NSOT
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW AND NSOT.SS_CODE='OPL'
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
  ON  ( SXOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ) 
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOV
  ON NSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND NSOV.SS_CD='OPL'
  AND NSOV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT                
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY        SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT       BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE        BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  -6666                      SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
  'OPL' SS_CODE,
  CAST(CAST(COALESCE(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01'  AS DATE)) AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') START_SSP_DATE,
  CAST(coalesce(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00'  AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) START_TV_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END_SSP_DATE,
  CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END_TV_DTM,
  '=' AS AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,
  NULL SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
  NULL ORDER_PROMOTION_CD,
  NULL ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
  NULL AS SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
  -658  BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 
  -658 SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY   ,
  NULL AS SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID,
  NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT  ,
  -658 SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
  NULL SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM,
  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  ,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
  'Y' DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 
  NULL AS  BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM,  /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  'N' SO_TAA_FLG  , 
  NULL SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,  
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  as REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY,/*NEED TO CHECK */
  '='SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG,
  '=' AS SO_GSA_FLG,
  '='  AS SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL  AS BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME ,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY, /*TBD */
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  SO_CLOSED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CASE WHEN NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN 'BOOKED' ELSE '=' END CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' AS DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  NULL AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD,/*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR,
  '='  AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,
  '=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG,
  NULL RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' RU_TRADE_IN_ROLE,
  NULL RU_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NULL ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
  'N' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  -999 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  CAST(NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  AS DATE) AS DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,
  SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN AS  CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  SXOHA.DEAL_ID SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
  'NOT FOUNDATION' FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  'UNK' AS COUNTRY_ENABLEMENT_COUNTRY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
   'N' AS SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
   'Y' AS SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SO_RETURN_DUE_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS DV_SO_RETURN_DUE_DT,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_DV_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DT,
   'UNKNOWN'  AS INTERNAL_USE_CD,
   'I' ACTION_CODE,
   'C'  DML_TYPE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS   RETURN_REASON_CODE,
   'SHIP' AS REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD,
   -999 END_CUST_ERP_CNTCT_PRTY_KEY/* priyavij:Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
  FROM    
  (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
  WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS  NOT NULL AND ORDER_ORIGIN <> 'CLOUD-CBM')  SXOHA 
  INNER JOIN  
  (SELECT SSO.*,COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM 
  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) SSO
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
  INNER JOIN 
  (SELECT NSOT.*,COALESCE(NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , NSOT.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NSOT 
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
  ON  ( SXOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ) 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOV
  ON NSOV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=SXOHA.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER

SELECT                
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY        SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER,-6666)  AS       BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
  SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE        BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.HEADER_ID,-6666) AS         SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
  'OPL' SS_CODE,
  CAST(CAST(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') START_SSP_DATE,
  CAST(SXOHA.CREATION_DATE  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) START_TV_DTM,
  CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD') END_SSP_DATE,
  CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) END_TV_DTM,
  '=' AS AUTO_BOOK_FLAG,
  NULL SO_SHIPPING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
  NULL ORDER_PROMOTION_CD,
  NULL ORDER_DISCOUNT_PERCENT,
  NULL AS SO_ALIGN_MERGE_CD,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_PACKING_INSTRUCTIONS_TXT,
  -658  BILL_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY , 
  -658 SHIP_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY   ,
  NULL AS SALES_ORDER_CS_FAX_IMAGE_ID,
  NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE SALES_ORDER_OPERATING_UNIT  ,
  -658 SOLD_TO_ERP_CONTACT_PARTY_KEY,
  NULL SALES_ORDER_RMA_AA_NUM,
  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_CREATE_DTM  ,
  USER EDW_CREATE_USER ,
  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  ,
  USER EDW_UPDATE_USER ,
  'Y' DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 
  NULL AS  BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM,  /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  'N' SO_TAA_FLG  , 
  NULL SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,  
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  as REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY,/*NEED TO CHECK */
  '='SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG,
  '=' AS SO_GSA_FLG,
  '='  AS SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL  AS BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME ,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  SXOHA.BILLING_DEPARTMENT AS SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY, /*TBD */
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  SO_CLOSED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CASE WHEN NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN 'BOOKED' ELSE '=' END CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' AS DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  NULL AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD,/*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR,
  '='  AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,
  '=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG,
  NULL RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' RU_TRADE_IN_ROLE,
  NULL RU_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NULL ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
  'N' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  -999 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  CAST(NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  AS DATE) AS DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,
  SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN AS  CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  SXOHA.DEAL_ID SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
  'NOT FOUNDATION' FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  'UNK' AS COUNTRY_ENABLEMENT_COUNTRY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
   'N' AS SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
   'Y' AS SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SO_RETURN_DUE_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS DV_SO_RETURN_DUE_DT,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_DV_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DT,
   'UNKNOWN'  AS INTERNAL_USE_CD,
   'I' ACTION_CODE,
   CASE WHEN NSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END DML_TYPE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS   RETURN_REASON_CODE,
   'SHIP' AS REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD,
   -999 END_CUST_ERP_CNTCT_PRTY_KEY/* priyavij:Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
  FROM    
  (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
  WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS NULL AND ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM'))  SXOHA 
  INNER JOIN  
  (SELECT SSO.*,COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)  SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
  FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) SSO
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
  AND SSO.SS_CODE = 'OPL'
  INNER JOIN 
  (SELECT NSOT.*,
  COALESCE(NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , NSOT.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT)  SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) NSOT
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW AND NSOT.SS_CODE = 'OPL'
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
  ON  ( SXOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ) 
  LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOV
  ON NSOV.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND NSOV.SS_CD = 'OPL'
  AND NSOV.END_TV_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'

SELECT                
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY        SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.ORDER_NUMBER, -6666)         BK_SO_NUMBER_INT  ,
  SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY    BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
  SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE        BK_COMPANY_CODE,
  COALESCE(SXOHA.HEADER_ID , -6666)           SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,

  CAST(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS TIMESTAMP(0)) EDW_UPDATE_DTM  ,

  'Y' DV_SO_NO_TOUCH_FLG, 
  NULL AS  BK_DEMAND_CLASS_CD ,
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS COMPLETE_ORDER_DTM,  /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  'N' SO_TAA_FLG  , 
  NULL SO_DPAS_RATING_CD  ,  
  SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY  as REFERENCE_SALES_ORDER_KEY,/*NEED TO CHECK */
  '='SO_TAX_EXEMPTED_FLG,
  '=' AS SO_GSA_FLG,
  '='  AS SO_DWP_ELIGIBLE_FLG,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVCS_PROJECT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SRC_RPTD_PROF_SVS_PROJ_DESCR,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL  AS BK_AR_PAYMENT_TERM_NAME ,
  NULL SRC_RPTD_SO_FINANCIAL_DEPT_ID,  /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  SXOHA.BILLING_DEPARTMENT  SO_FINANCIAL_DEPARTMENT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL SO_FINANCIAL_COMPANY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/
  NULL PARTNER_CUSTOMER_ACCT_KEY, /*TBD */
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) RU_SO_CANCELLED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CAST (NULL  AS TIMESTAMP(0))  SO_CLOSED_DTM, /*Loaded from Workflow Table*/
  CASE WHEN NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME IS NOT NULL THEN 'BOOKED' ELSE '=' END CISCO_BOOKED_RESULT_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' AS DROP_SHIP_FLG,
  NULL AS INVOICE_STRATEGY_CD,/*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS BILL_TO_EMAIL_ADDR,
  '='  AS SO_BILL_TO_CUST_TAX_EXEMPT_CD ,
  '=' AS US_FEDERAL_GOVT_ORDER_FLG,
  NULL RU_CTMP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL RU_REPORTED_TMIP_QUOTE_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  '=' RU_TRADE_IN_ROLE,
  NULL RU_RMA_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  NULL ES_ORDERED_BY_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_BILL_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT ,
  NULL ES_SHIP_TO_CONTACT_ID_INT,
  'N' AS REPAIR_ORDER_ROLE, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  -999 AS RU_BK_REPAIR_ORDER_NUM_INT, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  NULL AS RU_SRC_REPORTED_REPAIR_ORD_NUM, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  CAST(NSOT.RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME  AS DATE) AS DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,
  SXOHA.ORDER_ORIGIN AS  CCW_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  SXOHA.DEAL_ID SOURCE_REPORTED_GLOBAL_DEAL_ID,
  'NOT FOUNDATION' FOUNDATION_ORDER_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
  'UNK' AS COUNTRY_ENABLEMENT_COUNTRY_CD, /*Loaded from header_ext*/ 
   'N' AS SO_IN_CG1_FLG,
   'Y' AS SO_IN_SJ_FLG,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SO_RETURN_DUE_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS DV_SO_RETURN_DUE_DT,
   CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DTM,
   CAST(NULL AS DATE) AS RU_DV_SO_RETURN_CANCELLED_DT,
   'UNKNOWN'  AS INTERNAL_USE_CD,
   'I' ACTION_CODE,
   'C'  DML_TYPE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS REPLACEMENT_REASON_CODE,
   'UNKNOWN' AS   RETURN_REASON_CODE,
   'SHIP' AS REQUEST_DATE_BASIS_CD,
   -999 END_CUST_ERP_CNTCT_PRTY_KEY/* priyavij:Added as a part of Q2FY16 Plan*/
  FROM    
  (SELECT * FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXOPL_ORDER_HDRS_ALL
  WHERE ERP_ORDER_NUMBER IS  NOT NULL   AND  ORDER_ORIGIN IN('CLOUD-CBM'))  SXOHA 
  INNER JOIN  
  (SELECT SSO.*,COALESCE(SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , SSO.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW FROM 
  $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999) SSO
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW
  INNER JOIN 
  (SELECT NSOT.*,COALESCE(NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT , NSOT.SK_SBP_ORDER_ID_INT) SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
  FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT WHERE SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW<>-999 )NSOT 
  ON SXOHA.HEADER_ID=NSOT.SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT_NEW 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU 
  ON  ( SXOHA.ORG_ID = NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ) 
  INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV NSOV
  ON NSOV.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT=SXOHA.ERP_ORDER_NUMBER
